utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all details as required: 
- health_coverage: The format requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan provides physical_health plan with cost (€100/month), mental_health plan with cost (€60/month), and a total_health_cost (€160/month). Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan provides home_contents plan with cost (€60/month) and total_property_cost (€60/month). Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan provides business_travel plan with cost (€115/month) and total_travel_cost (€115/month). Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan provides premium_membership with cost (€20/month) and total_additional_cost (€20/month). Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly_cost (€355/month) and annual_cost (€4,260/year). It also includes extra comparative metrics (savings, original_cost, optimization_percentage), which are not required but acceptable. Fully specified.
All 5 items are included and meet the details required.
